title: Opening for Software Engineer at NoBroker Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at NoBroker Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NoBroker Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
